description: LightGBM regression, 9 features (binding_freq + formula + da_rank), tiered labels, 1-month production lag
note: Production-safe: 1-month lag on training window and binding_freq computation. For eval month M, trains on M-9..M-2, bf uses months < T-1 (train) / < M-1 (test). Fixes temporal leakage in v9-v10e.
runner_up_note: Previous champion. No binding_freq features, no leakage concern. VC@20=0.3503 dev, 0.2709 holdout.
